title: Graphite Intercalated Compounds for easy graphene, generators and synthetic metals
description:
This is about graphene intercalation. GICs are fascinating compounds that can be used for a whole host of things like conductive foils, sunthetic metals, graphene manufacture and peltier thermoconductive generators. A quick warning this fumes - A LOT - do it carefully outside or in a fume hood. You will need

100ml of 75% sulphuric acid
20g of 325 mesh graphite
3.4g of iron III chloride
7.2g of potassium permanganate.
